generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed within the building to capture real-time environmental temperature data, integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware for standardized data ingestion. Semantically annotated in BIM with tenant associations and spatial location metadata."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time humidity levels within the building environment, standardized through Eclipse Hono for real-time data synchronization with the DT. Includes BIM-based semantic annotations for device configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting occupancy patterns within building spaces, integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware. BIM model contains semantic metadata including tenant IDs and spatial relationships for automated mapping to virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor monitoring real-time energy consumption metrics across building systems, standardized through Eclipse Hono for preprocessing and integration into the DT. BIM annotations include device type and endpoint configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralPerformanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing structural performance data (e.g., vibration, load) from building components, ingested via Eclipse Hono middleware. BIM model provides semantic annotations for sensor placement and calibration parameters."
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings transmitted from IoT sensors via Eclipse Hono middleware to the DT, enabling bidirectional synchronization with virtual representations in the BIM-based twin."
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data transmitted through Eclipse Hono for integration into the DT, supporting environmental condition monitoring and occupant comfort analysis."
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    base:desc "Occupancy patterns transmitted via Eclipse Hono middleware to the DT, enabling dynamic updates to virtual representations based on physical occupancy states."
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics transmitted through standardized Eclipse Hono pipelines to the DT for real-time monitoring and optimization analysis."
]

instance StructuralDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralPerformanceSensor
    base:desc "Structural performance data transmitted via Eclipse Hono for integration into the DT, enabling real-time validation of physical asset integrity."
]

// C10: Models and Data
instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the building from BIM models serving as the foundational spatial framework for the DT. Enriched with semantic annotations for sensor placements and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance BIMFunctionalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Functional representation from BIM models detailing building systems (HVAC, lighting) and their operational parameters, used for control logic mapping in the DT."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time sensor data (temperature, humidity, occupancy) processed through Eclipse Hono and synchronized with the DT via Eclipse Ditto for operational decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, StructuralDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) derived from post-occupancy sensor data, integrated into the DT for dynamic operational optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Life-cycle energy performance simulation model leveraging BIM data and runtime analytics to optimize energy consumption across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationOptimizationService, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT middleware (Eclipse Hono) standardizing sensor data ingestion (MQTT protocol) and preprocessing for real-time transmission to the DT. Provides latency-optimized pipelines for operational decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware (Eclipse Ditto) enabling bidirectional communication between the DT and physical systems via device twin patterns and RESTful APIs. Supports standardized extension points for custom services."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationOptimizationService, ControlExecutionService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity visualization platform (Unreal Engine 5) providing immersive 3D interaction for real-time monitoring and simulation of building operations. Enables stakeholder engagement through interactive DT representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating generation of runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto device twins) from BIM models via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations, reducing manual configuration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentPipelineService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning infrastructure (e.g., BOREALIS project) integrated into the DT for optimizing control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization and analysis of operational data (energy consumption, environmental conditions) via Unreal Engine for immersive 3D interaction with the DT."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalConditionInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of reinforcement learning models to predict equipment failures and optimize control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on runtime sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction, LightingOptimizationAction
]

instance SimulationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Life-cycle modeling for energy efficiency, structural performance, and cost optimization, leveraging BIM data and runtime analytics for decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralPerformanceInsight
]

instance ControlExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution framework for bidirectional control logic between the DT and physical actuators (e.g., HVAC, lighting) via Eclipse Ditto middleware, enabling real-time operational adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACAdjustmentAction, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance DeploymentPipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated MDE pipeline generating runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto device twins) from BIM models, reducing manual effort during DT deployment and evolution."
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinInitializationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive alerts generated by predictive analytics indicating potential equipment failures (e.g., HVAC components) based on sensor data patterns."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven suggestions for reducing energy consumption (e.g., occupancy-based lighting adjustments) derived from runtime analytics and simulation models."
]

instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of environmental conditions (temperature, humidity) to recommend adjustments for occupant comfort (e.g., ventilation, lighting)."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of environmental parameters (temperature, humidity) within the DT for operational monitoring."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of energy usage across building systems presented through immersive 3D visualization in Unreal Engine."
]

instance StructuralPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of structural data to assess building integrity and recommend maintenance actions based on performance metrics."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system triggering notifications for predictive maintenance based on sensor data anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-driven adjustments to lighting systems based on occupancy patterns and energy efficiency goals."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control of HVAC systems through the DT, adjusting temperature and airflow based on real-time sensor inputs and comfort requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control of lighting systems via the DT, optimizing energy use while maintaining occupant comfort based on occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinInitializationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime DT artifacts (e.g., Ditto device twins) from BIM models during deployment phase."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator embedded within the HVAC infrastructure, modeled in BIM and configured to execute temperature/airflow control logic based on DT inputs via Eclipse Ditto middleware."
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator integrated with the DT, enabling dynamic adjustments to lighting levels based on occupancy patterns and energy optimization policies."
]

instance VentilationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component controlling ventilation systems, configured through the DT to maintain optimal air quality based on real-time sensor data."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor, StructuralPerformanceSensor,
                 HVACController, LightingController, VentilationController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMGeometricModel, BIMFunctionalModel, RuntimeSensorData, ControlLogicModel, EnergyPerformanceSimulation,
                 EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngineEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler,
                 ReinforcementLearningEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService,
                 SimulationOptimizationService, ControlExecutionService, DeploymentPipelineService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interactions are achieved through **runtime control logic** generated from BIM models and deployed via standardized middleware interfaces (Eclipse Ditto). The DT processes inputs (e.g., optimization algorithms, user commands) and generates control signals (e.g., actuator commands) that are transmitted back to the physical system via bidirectional communication protocols. For example, the DT may adjust lighting systems or HVAC settings based on occupancy data, with the control actions executed by physical actuators. The framework ensures **low-latency, bidirectional communication** to maintain operational coherence between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across **multiple time scales**, aligned with AECO operational requirements:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Millisecond-to-second granularity for **sensor data ingestion** and **control signal execution** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC responses).
  - **Near-real-time analytics**: Minute-to-hourly intervals for **predictive analytics** (e.g., occupancy forecasting, energy consumption trends).
  - **Life-cycle optimization**: Daily-to-weekly timeframes for **long-term performance tuning** (e.g., adaptive control policy refinement in BOREALIS).
  The framework supports **asynchronous event processing** (e.g., alarms, anomalies) alongside **periodic data updates** to balance responsiveness and computational load."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented platform** with standardized interfaces for:
  - **Data ingestion** (from sensors via Hono/Ditto).
  - **Control output** (to actuators via middleware).
  - **Visualization and analytics** (via Unreal Engine and custom services).
  The framework supports **scalable deployment** across multiple buildings or infrastructure systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life-cycle stages** of the physical asset, from **design (as-built)** to **operation (as-operated)**, with phased representations:
   - **Design/Construction Phase**: The DT is initialized from BIM models, incorporating static geometric and semantic data for pre-commissioning validation.
   - **Commissioning Phase**: Runtime data integration begins, with sensor configurations and control logic embedded into the DT via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
   - **Operational Phase**: The DT continuously synchronizes with physical systems, enabling real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control (e.g., energy optimization via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
   - **Adaptive Phase**: The DT evolves through **runtime updates** (e.g., adding new sensors, integrating custom services) to accommodate changing operational requirements. The framework supports **incremental deployment** to minimize downtime during upgrades."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** (to measure alignment between PT and DT).
  - **Verification and validation** of BIM-to-DT transformations.
  - **Uncertainty modeling** (e.g., sensor noise, model drift).
  The framework addresses **semantic drift** (misalignment between digital and physical representations) via automated synchronization mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time technical connections**, utilizing:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: **Telemetry ingestion layer** with **MQTT/HTTP support** for **sensor data streams** (e.g., temperature, occupancy).
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: **Device management platform** providing **RESTful APIs** for **bidirectional control** (e.g., actuator commands).
  - **Standardized protocols**: **OPC UA** for **industrial IoT integration** and **MQTT** for **lightweight telemetry**.
  Connections are **securely authenticated** via **JWT/OAuth2** mechanisms, though **specific network architectures** (e.g., cloud vs. edge) are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable, middleware-centric architecture** with:
  - **Core middleware**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** hosted on **cloud or on-premise Kubernetes clusters** for **high availability**.
  - **Visualization layer**: **Unreal Engine** deployed as **standalone applications** or **web-based plugins** (e.g., via Unreal’s **HTML5 export**).
  - **Containerization**: **Docker/Kubernetes** supports **modular scaling** of DT services (e.g., analytics, visualization).
  The framework does not specify **exact cloud providers** (e.g., AWS, Azure) but emphasizes **containerized microservices** for **flexible deployment topologies**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to the following **standards**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **COBie** for **asset data exchange**.
  - **IoT/OT Standards**: **OPC UA** for **industrial device integration** and **MQTT** for **telemetry protocols**.
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto’s** **Thing Model** for **device semantics** and **Eclipse Hono’s** **telemetry APIs**.
  The architecture emphasizes **modular standardization** to enable **plug-and-play integration** with **third-party systems** (e.g., ERP, CMMS)."
]
